name: io.github.BuildPulseLLC/buildpulse-mcp
description: BuildPulse CI test analytics for AI agents — flaky tests, coverage, and CI run history.

environmentVariables.name: BUILDPULSE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: BuildPulse API token (either `bp_<64-hex>` or legacy 40-hex shape). Get one at buildpulse.io → Organization Settings → API Tokens.

environmentVariables.name: PLATFORM_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the platform API base URL. Default: https://platform.buildpulse.io

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <BuildPulse API token> — accepts either `bp_<64-hex>` or legacy `<40-hex>`. Or use OAuth — see /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server for the discovery doc.
